title: Ukrainian Lentil Pilaf
description: Hearty and flavorful, this Ukrainian-inspired lentil pilaf is a comforting meal for any time of day.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced red onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced green carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the lentils and pilaf rice to the saucepan, stirring to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the water has been absorbed and the lentils and rice are tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
